basic_details.job_title: GVHSS Jhumpura Guest Faculty Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.organization_name: Government Vocational Higher Secondary School Jhumpura (GVHSS Jhumpura)
basic_details.short_information: Government Vocational Higher Secondary School Jhumpura (GVHSS Jhumpura) Guest Faculty Notification 2026 has been released on 06 June 2026 on the official website. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the GVHSS Jhumpura Guest Faculty Recruitment 2026 for the post of Guest Faculty in Drone Pilot Trade.

age_limit.age_details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

qualification.education_qualification: Degree/B. Voc (Bachelor in Vocation) in Mechanical, Electrical and Electronics Engineering, with at least 1-year work/teaching experience. OR Diploma in Mechanical and Electrical and Electronics Engineering with at least 2 years work/teaching experience.
qualification.details: Guest Faculty in Drone Pilot Trade: Degree/B. Voc (Bachelor in Vocation) in Mechanical, Electrical and Electronics Engineering, from a recognized Institute / University, with at least 1-year work/teaching experience. OR Diploma in Mechanical and Electrical and Electronics Engineering from a recognized institute / University with at least 2 years work / teaching experience.

vacancy_details.Post Name: Guest Faculty in Drone Pilot Trade

salary_details.details: Rs.400/- per class / Lecturer of 45 minutes duration subject to a ceiling of maximum 40 classes with Rs.16000/- per month

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: .
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 16-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the GVHSS Jhumpura Guest Faculty recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the Guest Faculty posts at GVHSS Jhumpura is 16 June 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the post name for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The recruitment is for the post of Guest Faculty, specifically in the Drone Pilot Trade.

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary offered for the Guest Faculty position?
faq.answer: The salary is Rs. 16000 Per Month, calculated at Rs.400/- per class of 45 minutes duration, with a maximum of 40 classes.

faq.question: Q4. What are the educational qualifications required?
faq.answer: Candidates need a Degree/B. Voc in Mechanical, Electrical and Electronics Engineering with 1 year of experience, or a Diploma in the same fields with 2 years of experience.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q6. How can I apply for this job?
faq.answer: The application mode is offline. You need to download the application form, fill it, attach necessary documents, and send it to the official address before the last date.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve an Interview and Certificate Verification.

faq.question: Q8. Where is the Government Vocational Higher Secondary School Jhumpura located?
faq.answer: The school is located in Jhumpura, Odisha.

faq.question: Q9. Is this a contractual job?
faq.answer: Yes, the job is on a contractual basis.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification?
faq.answer: The official notification can be accessed through the "Important Links" section of this article, under the "Official Notification PDF" link.
